title: RBI Issues Final Directions on Specified Non-Financial Assets (SNFAs) - Prohibition on Sale to Borrowers and Related Parties
description: <cite index="44-3">RBI issued final prudential norms prohibiting banks, small finance banks and NBFCs from selling specified non-financial assets acquired during resolution of stressed loans back to the defaulting borrower or related parties, effective October 1, 2026</cite>.
